data.title: KAITO hit 1.79 USDT at the opening of OKX
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: OKX market data shows that KAITO opened at 1.7999USDT on OKX and is currently trading at 1.51USDT.

data.title: KAITO Opened at 0.1000 USDT Currently Trading at 1.4633 USDT
data.description: According to Binance market data, KAITO opened at 0.1000 USDT on Binance and is currently quoted at 1.4633 USDT. The token has experienced a 1.4633% increase over the past 24 hours.

data.title: Lack Of Stablecoin Regulation Hinders Adoption In The U.S.
data.description: According to PANews, a report by S&P Global Ratings released on Wednesday highlights the absence of stablecoin regulation as a significant barrier to its adoption in the United States. Analysts, led by Mohamed Damak, emphasized that the lack of regulatory framework is a primary obstacle preventing the widespread institutional adoption of stablecoins. The report suggests that stablecoins are expected to play an increasingly important role in on-chain transactions. It is anticipated that once regulatory measures are established, the adoption rate of stablecoins will rise.

data.title: To receive the airdrop, users need to pay an on-chain fee of 0.0015 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Imk.fun monitoring, on-chain transactions show that in order to receive KAITO airdrops, users need to pay a fixed fee of 0.0015 ETH (4.1 USD). This may be the service fee of tokentable. So far, 36 ETH (about 98,800 USD) have been collected and are growing.

data.title: KAITO Now Available on Binance Simple Earn, Buy Crypto, Convert, Margin, and Futures
data.description: Binance has announced the expansion of its KAITO (KAITO) token offerings across multiple services, allowing users to engage in various trading and earning opportunities. Starting February 20, 2025, KAITO will be integrated into Binance Simple Earn, Binance Convert, Margin trading, Auto-Invest, and Binance Futures.KAITO Joins Binance Simple Earn and Auto-InvestKAITO will be listed on Binance Simple Earn as a flexible product, enabling users to subscribe and earn passive income on their holdings. Additionally, starting February 21, 2025, at 10:00 UTC, users can purchase KAITO via Binance Auto-Invest, which supports automated crypto investments.Buy and Trade KAITO with Zero Fees on Binance ConvertUsers can buy KAITO directly with Visa, MasterCard, Google Pay, Apple Pay, and Revolut on Binance’s “Buy Crypto” page. Additionally, traders can swap KAITO against BTC, USDT, and other tokens on Binance Convert with zero trading fees once the token goes live on Binance Spot.KAITO Available on Binance Margin with Cross & Isolated TradingBinance Margin will enable KAITO borrowing on both Cross and Isolated Margin trading. The KAITO/USDT and KAITO/USDC pairs will be available starting February 20, 2025, at 14:30 UTC. High-tier Binance VIP users will have early access to borrow before the official trading launch.Binance Futures Introduces KAITOUSDT Perpetual Contracts with 75x LeverageBinance Futures will launch the USDⓈ-M KAITOUSDT Perpetual Contract on February 20, 2025, at 13:00 UTC, offering traders up to 75x leverage. The contract will settle in USDT and include a capped funding rate of +2.00% / -2.00%, with funding fees settled every four hours.Futures Trading Details:Perpetual ContractKAITOUSDTLaunch TimeFebruary 20, 2025, 13:00 UTCLeverageUp to 75xSettlement AssetUSDTTick SizeTo be confirmedFunding Fee SettlementEvery four hoursTrading Hours24/7Multi-Assets ModeSupportedBinance reserves the right to adjust trading specifications based on market conditions, including leverage, funding rates, tick size, and margin requirements.KAITO Futures to be Available for Copy TradingThe KAITOUSDT Perpetual Contract will be accessible on Binance Futures Copy Trading within 24 hours of its launch, allowing traders to mirror the strategies of experienced investors.

data.title: SlowMist Cosine: Beware of fake KAITO tokens appearing on DEX Screener
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: SlowMist Yuxian posted on the X platform, warning people to be wary of fake KAITO tokens appearing on DEX Screener to avoid being deceived.

data.title: Binance will launch KAITO 1-75x U-margin perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement of Binance, Binance will launch KAITO 1-75 times U-based perpetual contract at 21:00 tonight.

data.title: Warning Issued Over Fake KAITO Tokens on DEX Screener
data.description: According to Odaily, SlowMist's Cosine has issued a warning on the X platform regarding the presence of fake KAITO tokens appearing in searches on DEX Screener. Users are advised to exercise caution to avoid falling victim to scams.

data.title: Nansen: 86% of Investors Lose Big While Insiders Cash In on Milei-Backed LIBRA
data.description:
TL;DR Nansen reports that 86% of investors in the Milei-backed LIBRA project have suffered significant losses, while insiders reportedly cashed in on the project. The losses faced by investors are attributed to insiders capitalizing on the initial hype, leading to widespread disillusionment and concerns about transparency and accountability. Critics argue that the project’s tokenomics allowed...
source: https://crypto-economy.com/nansen-86-of-investors-lose-big-while-insiders-cash-in-on-milei-backed-libra/

data.title: Tether Co-Founder Launches Yield-Bearing Stablecoin
data.description:
Reeve Collins, the co-founder of Tether, has announced a new project.  This latest project, called Pi Protocol, aims to introduce a yield-bearing stablecoin that could offer users something extra: earnings on their crypto holdings.
